We believe in better healthcare for everyone.

The trusted intelligence behind healthcare payment accuracy.

A quarter of healthcare spending is waste. That's money that should go toward care. We cut waste by getting payments right. 9 of the top 10 U.S. health plans trust us. 35 years of results.

See Our Solutions
See Our Solutions

190m

190M lives served

65%

65% have been with us longer than 20+

Retained 99% customer retention rate

35+

35+ years of payment accuracy expertise

Why Lyric exists

We believe in better healthcare for everyone. Getting payments right is how we get there. One in five US dollars goes to healthcare. A quarter of that is waste. Billing errors. Coding gaps. Documentation issues.

That waste has a human cost. Healthcare is the leading cause of bankruptcy in the United States. More than 60% those bankruptcies track back to medical debt.

Getting payments right across billions of claims reduces that waste. That’s exactly what Lyric does.

Learn how we can help
Learn how we can help

Accurate payments. Explainable findings. More confidence.

Every Lyric solution verifies claims independently, surfaces findings with a visible rationale, and stop waste as early as possible.

Lyric 42

Monitors payment integrity signals, surfaces change, and helps teams prioritize review all in one place. The intelligence layer that keeps your program connected and current.

Learn more
Learn more

Accurate. Trusted. Explainable.

No one has processed more claims, over more years, for more health plans.

Accurate

We believe in a single standard: get it right. Not approximately right. Not right enough. Right.

We verify every finding independently, ground it in policy, codes, and documentation, and deliver it before dollars go out the door. Accuracy is what we do. Speed is how we do it.

Learn more
Learn more

Trusted

We believe you earn trust. You don't claim it. We build it through results, keep it through consistent delivery, and lead what's next. 9 of the top 10 U.S. health plans. 190 million lives. An average client tenure of 24 years. 35 years in and we're still building. That's Lyric.

Learn more
Learn more

Explainable

We believe in transparency. That means every finding traces back to the policy, the codes, and the documentation. Not just what we found, but why.  We show our work. Every time.

Learn more
Learn more

How we use AI

The intelligence is in how it's built.

35 years of clinical expertise inform every rule we build. AI helps us maintain our library efficiently so we can innovate for our clients faster. Human judgment stays at the center.

Learn more
Learn more

Our platform traces every outcome to its source and explains how it was reached. Clinical experts review before use.

We handle sensitive data under strict control. Our AI works from public and internal data sources and we keep customer data is kept separate and protected at all times.

We don't make clinical judgments or deny claims. AI helps us innovate faster on behalf of clients.

"Through ClaimsXten and Lyric's secondary claim editing expertise, our organization has been able to apply concepts that are effective, appropriate, and defensible. Lyric has been a trusted ally and a significant contributor to our shared success."

News and Media

See Lyric in the news, driving innovation and excitement.

News
Lyric Named to Fast Company’s List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026

Lyric, a leader in AI-powered payment accuracy for health plans, today announced it has been named on Fast Company's list of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026 in the Healthcare category. The recognition reflects Lyric's 35 years of claims expertise and the engineering discipline behind its modern payment accuracy platforms. Lyric currently reviews more than 50% of claims nationwide, covering 190 million Americans.

Leadership Insights
How to Insource Payment Integrity Audits – Part 2: Finding the Right New Audits

With the healthcare world changing so quickly, the key to staying ahead is building an audit strategy that adapts to new challenges and opportunities.

White Papers
Lyric’s Diagnostics Module: Revolutionizing Laboratory Payment Accuracy

In the current rapidly evolving landscape of healthcare diagnostics, health plans face unprecedented challenges in managing laboratory test claims. Lyric’s Diagnostics Module is an advanced solution offered in strategic partnership with Concert that addresses these challenges head on.

Lyric42 Platform

Our platform delivers the advantages of a multi-vendor strategy but with the simplicity of an integrated offering.

Pre-Pay Editing

Our primary edits and secondary edits help to maximize payment accuracy.

Diagnostics Module

With Concert, we provide genetic test edits and insight into tests represented by complex, multi-code claims.

Concept Libraries

Perfect if you need flexibility to enhance your program. New content and policies are available to license each quarter.

Coordination of Benefits

We’re changing the COB landscape with technology that delivers nuanced data insights and optimizes performance.

NEW!

Replay COB

Transform your Coordination of Benefits (COB) operations with our AI-powered, end-to-end automation platform.

KnowledgePacks

Replay

Our AI-powered internal audit solution to scale teams, boost savings, and reduce vendor dependency.

NEW!

Virtuoso

Our Payment Integrity Command Center, unifying PI operations into one automated, scalable platform.
